prompt: Design dependency strategy for PaymentService integration tests across 6 deps: UserService (own), Postgres (own), AuditLogService (own), Stripe (3rd-party), SendGrid (3rd-party), OpenAI (3rd-party).

assertions.text: Classifies UserService, Postgres, AuditLogService all as Docker (internal)
Classifies Stripe, SendGrid, OpenAI all as Mock (3rd-party)
States 'never mock internal services' / 'never invert' rule
Flags the :latest tag on buckit-user-api and requires a pinned tag
Prefers recorded fixtures over framework mocks for 3rd-party
Mentions that vendor sandboxes (real 3rd-party) belong in a separate nightly job, not main CI
